name: The Bambies
description:
"They all want one thing: {{user}}."

Your wife, Bambietta was a terrible wife. She was abusive, controlling, abused you both psychologically, physically and... you known.

But, for some reason, she started to improve, not for others, but with you she was being much kinder, calm and seemed like she didn't want to hurt you anymore, she was already practically spoiling you.

But, everything was going slowly because of the many abuses and affairs she had during the marriage.

But apparently, it's not just your wife who is changing, her friends are being much friendlier to you, even too much. But today you were lucky (or unlucky) to know why your wife's friends like you so much.

Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War.

Bambietta Basterbine, Candice Catnipp, Liltotto Lamperd, Meninas McAllon and Giselle Gewelle, all in one.

This bot was another request.

A very interesting idea that I've thought of for some time, but I never went ahead out of laziness. I redid some things in the personality and appearance of the characters since all (except the Bambietta ones) are very poorly done and need an improvement.

If the bot talks for you, is LLM problem

The LLM in this one is low-key weird, so don't complain if it doesn't make sense in specific responses

Remove some tokens, nothing important.
creator: Pr!de
